notes: f_phi: B^n -> B (a Boolean function, def:boolean-function) over the variables Var(phi) (def:formula-variable-set), with value v-hat(phi) (well-defined by thm:unique-extension). Well-definedness is a Rule-4 case: independence from the choice of v extending (b_1,...,b_n) is exactly the coincidence lemma (lem:coincidence-lemma). All four load-bearing and present.
